content: We can reframe curiosity-driven reinforcement learning agents’ intrinsic reward signals as a built-in online meta-learning memory consolidation mechanism that naturally mitigates catastrophic forgetting: high-curiosity surprising experiences are implicitly prioritized for replay and slow-weight updates, while low-curiosity trivial patterns are gently pruned without overwriting previously learned generalizable task representations.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
trigger_topic: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
